title: Fix 5 P3 codereview bugs (senml/codec/app_identity/rust validation)
description: Select top 5 ready P3s (kiab,mqoh,0bb7,sciu,2jco). Fix unhandled CBOR, UDP checksum, redundant strlen, name length validation, memset redundancy per codereview. Use 3 independent subagent codereview passes (correctness/security/edges). Update tests/vectors, ensure no test weakening. Scope: senml.rs, codec.rs, app_identity.rs/c.
close_reason: Fixed per codereview: cbor.rs indefinite->NotImplemented + name concat len check (kiab/sciu), codec.rs finalize zero->0xFFFF (mqoh), app_identity.c copy_string single strlen + removed redundant memset (0bb7/2jco). 3 subagent passes (explore+2 general reviews), cargo test -p lichen-senml/schc pass, no test weakening, RustCrypto/C conventions followed. Epic complete.
